name: 2026-06-07 Political Commentary BHW Magna Carta Stalled TH
description:
Barangay Health Workers walked the country through COVID, dengue surges, and every typhoon.

Their Magna Carta has been waiting on a Senate vote for years.

Sila ang pumapasok. Hindi ang Senado.

This week senators no-showed sessions to fight over committee chairs. The bill protecting the people who actually show up is still in the queue.

The frontline walks. The chamber stalls.

Barangay Health Workers walked the country through COVID, dengue surges, and every typhoon.

Their Magna Carta has been waiting on a Senate vote for years.

Sila ang pumapasok. Hindi ang Senado.

This week senators no-showed sessions to fight over committee chairs. The bill protecting the people who actually show up is still in the queue.

The frontline walks. The chamber stalls.

June 1-6, 2026: Philippine Senate paralysis after Sen. Jinggoy Estrada's plunder arrest. Majority bloc led by SP Cayetano boycotted June 1 5PM session to retain Blue Ribbon and other committee chairs (Rappler). PNA confirms Magna Carta of Barangay Health Workers among stalled bills publicly named by minority. June 3: Escudero joins minority bloc to declare 12-senator quorum; Gatchalian elected presiding officer (Inquirer, Philstar). IBP and law deans back legality of June 3 quorum (Inquirer, Rappler). FINEX warns of investment delays (Manila Bulletin). Marcos publicly told senators to get back to work June 4 (Philstar).
